# Flutter BLoC Advance Template

> A production-ready, open-source Flutter starter template using BLoC pattern for state management with Feature-First Clean Architecture. Supports Android, iOS, Web, macOS, Linux, and Windows. Built with Flutter 3.41.8, Dart 3.11.5, flutter_bloc 9.1.1, and go_router 17.1.0.

This project provides a complete foundation for building enterprise-grade Flutter applications. It includes authentication (login, register, forgot password, OTP verification), user management (CRUD operations), role-based access control (Admin/User roles), a responsive design system, dark/light theming, English/Turkish localization, and multi-environment support (local mock data and production API).

## Architecture

The project follows Feature-First Clean Boundaries architecture with strict dependency rules:

- `app/` — Composition root: DI, router, shell (sidebar, top bar, bottom nav, command palette), theme, session bootstrap
- `core/` — Cross-cutting primitives: errors, logging, security utilities
- `infrastructure/` — External adapters: HTTP client, environment config, local storage
- `shared/` — Business-free reusable UI: design system (14 components, theme tokens), shared widgets, utilities
- `features/` — 5 self-contained business modules: account, auth, dashboard, settings, users

Each feature contains: `application/` (BLoC + use cases), `data/` (models, repositories), `domain/` (entities, repository interfaces), `navigation/` (route definitions), `presentation/` (pages, widgets).

Dependency flow: `app` → `features` → `shared` → `core`. Features cannot import from other features' internals. BLoCs depend on use cases, not repositories directly. Dependency rules are enforced by architecture guard tests.

## Tech Stack

- **State Management:** flutter_bloc 9.1.1 with Equatable for state equality
- **Routing:** go_router 17.1.0 with feature-based route composition
- **HTTP:** dio 5.7.0 with interceptor chain (auth token injection, mock data, structured logging)
- **Error Handling:** Dart 3 sealed Result<T> type with typed AppError hierarchy (no raw exceptions)
- **Forms:** flutter_form_builder 10.3.0+2 with form_builder_validators
- **Localization:** intl 0.20.2 with ARB files and intl_utils code generation
- **Storage:** shared_preferences 2.5.4
- **Charts:** fl_chart for dashboard visualizations
- **Testing:** flutter_test, bloc_test, mocktail (568+ tests, architecture guard tests)
- **CI/CD:** GitHub Actions (build, test, web deploy, SonarQube)

## Quick Start

Clone and run with mock data (no backend required):
```
git clone https://github.com/cevheri/flutter-bloc-advanced.git
cd flutter-bloc-advanced
fvm install 3.41.8 && fvm use 3.41.8 && fvm flutter pub get
fvm flutter run --target lib/main/main_local.dart
```

Demo credentials: admin/admin (full access), user/user (limited access).

- [README](https://github.com/cevheri/flutter-bloc-advanced/blob/main/README.md): Full project overview, quick start, tech stack, and contributing guide
- [Architecture Design Document](https://github.com/cevheri/flutter-bloc-advanced/blob/main/docs/feature-first-clean-boundaries.md): Dependency rules, feature structure, routing and state management rules
- [Architecture Migration Guide](https://github.com/cevheri/flutter-bloc-advanced/blob/main/docs/architecture-migration_en.md): Detailed migration from layered to feature-first architecture
- [Flutter Upgrade Guide](https://github.com/cevheri/flutter-bloc-advanced/blob/main/docs/upgrade_flutter_3.41.8.md): Flutter 3.41.8 upgrade notes
- [DeepWiki](https://deepwiki.com/cevheri/flutter-bloc-advanced): AI-powered project wiki

## Source Code

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/cevheri/flutter-bloc-advanced): Full source code
- [lib/app/](https://github.com/cevheri/flutter-bloc-advanced/tree/main/lib/app): Application foundation (DI, router, shell, theme)
- [lib/features/](https://github.com/cevheri/flutter-bloc-advanced/tree/main/lib/features): Feature modules (account, auth, dashboard, settings, users)
- [lib/shared/](https://github.com/cevheri/flutter-bloc-advanced/tree/main/lib/shared): Design system, shared widgets, and utilities
- [lib/core/](https://github.com/cevheri/flutter-bloc-advanced/tree/main/lib/core): Error handling, logging, security
- [lib/infrastructure/](https://github.com/cevheri/flutter-bloc-advanced/tree/main/lib/infrastructure): HTTP, environment config, storage
- [test/](https://github.com/cevheri/flutter-bloc-advanced/tree/main/test): Test suite mirroring lib/ structure
